description_long: This is a modern sniper or marksman rifle featuring a long, matte-black barrel with an attached suppressor at the muzzle. The rifle is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for precision aiming at long distances. Its chassis is a mix of dark and olive drab tones, with a skeletonized adjustable stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, and a bipod is mounted near the front for stability during prone or supported shooting. The overall design suggests a tactical, high-precision firearm suitable for urban or field operations. The materials and finish indicate durability and functionality in demanding environments.
description: A modern tactical sniper rifle with a suppressor, scope, bipod, and adjustable stock in dark and olive tones. Designed for precision and stability, it features a detachable magazine and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor, bipod legs, and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, scope, bipod, detachable magazine, and adjustable stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope, with the suppressor visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the stock, scope, and bipod from the other side.
